title: Kaji has Alzheimers
wikitext:
[]: Kaji has Alzheimers             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Nov 11, 2006 12:41 pm Seriously, he delivers Adam to Gendo personally and hears Gendo call her ADAM, yet when he shows Lilith to Misato he's like "lol this is adam". Therefore I proclaim the best explanation for this continuity error is Alzheimer's Disease. Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 1:02 pm Nerv grow Adam into giant, marshmallowy blob FAST. Adam lose legs, bleed yellow stuff, start budding multiple legs / lower torsos out of bottom, get crucified, and have face covered with mask for no good reason. THIS IS ADAM.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Nov 11, 2006 3:05 pm Kaji is a backstabbing triple agent who can't be trusted to give an accurate time of day. So there.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 3:39 pm I thought he only spied for Nerv and the Japanese gov't (or something). Seele are just the ones who had him shot dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 11, 2006 4:22 pm Reichu wrote: I thought he only spied for Nerv and the Japanese gov't (or something). Seele are just the ones who had him shot dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Nov 11, 2006 6:12 pm Kaji killed Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sat Nov 11, 2006 8:59 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Kaji killed Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 10:52 pm Ornette wrote: He wasn't the one that kidnapped Fuyu? Or was that just suspicion on Nerv's part.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 12, 2006 3:58 am as fer the whole "This is Adam" line...he may have been trying to trick Misato... or maybe when calling it Adam to Gendo...he was trying to trick Gendo

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 12, 2006 4:11 am master0rolando wrote: or maybe when calling it Adam to Gendo...he was trying to trick Gendo

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Nov 13, 2006 2:55 am master0rolando wrote: as fer the whole "This is Adam" line...he may have been trying to trick Misato...

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Nov 13, 2006 2:57 am Simple, he learned after he showed "Adam" to Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Nov 13, 2006 2:58 am cat42 wrote: Simple, he learned after he showed "Adam" to Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Nov 13, 2006 3:03 am MaggotMaster wrote: cat42 wrote: Simple, he learned after he showed "Adam" to Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 3:32 am But why would Kaji think Lil was Adam in the first place? You know, the principle of CONSIDERING ALL POSSIBILITIES? "Maybe it's, like, something I don't know about -- time to investigate!" The wackiness of the transition from tiny embryo to that thing on the cross must have elicited at least some suspicion. I mean, COME ON.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Nov 13, 2006 3:46 am Reichu wrote: But why would Kaji think Lil was Adam in the first place? You know, the principle of CONSIDERING ALL POSSIBILITIES? "Maybe it's, like, something I don't know about -- time to investigate!" The wackiness of the transition from tiny embryo to that thing on the cross must have elicited at least some suspicion. I mean, COME ON.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 4:05 am Then Kaji totally sucks. Because the Evas are supposed to be based upon Adam, so a revived Adam should look kind of like ... an Eva, not a giant, white, humanoid blob. I mean, for crissake. Even Misato and Kaworu can't seem to tell the difference, and Kaworu bloody IS Adam. Narrativium must do damning things to one's senses.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Nov 13, 2006 4:08 am Look, Adam is a white giant too, and all white giants look alike. Misato has a decent excuse in that she barely saw the thing, and it was sooooo many years ago. Kaji has an excuse, because Anno was fucking with him just like he was with us. Kaworu... So caught up in his utter lust/love for Shinji that he wasn't paying attention. (Oh, Shinji, I've been a bad boy, crush me like the insect that I am God, the angels are pervs...)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 13, 2006 4:20 am 使徒はヘンタイじゃないよ。(サキエルとシャムシェルを除いてâ€¦　あら、アルミサエルとバルディエルも、多分。）で、君がその者なのか。 [Shito wa hentai ja nai yo. (Sachiel to Shamshel o nozoite... Ara, Armisael to Bardiel mo, tabun.) De, kimi ga sono mono na no ka.]

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Nov 13, 2006 9:54 am Reichu wrote: Are there indications that he is actually reporting to Seele the way he's reporting to the Japanese gov't?
summary:
[]: Kaji has Alzheimers             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Nov 11, 2006 12:41 pm Seriously, he delivers Adam to Gendo personally and hears Gendo call her ADAM, yet when he shows Lilith to Misato he's like "lol this is adam". Therefore I proclaim the best explanation for this continuity error is Alzheimer's Disease. Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu &r
